requirement_title: Cascading Context with Document Tree View

TC-S5-011-01.description: Load case, verify document tree view generated correctly

TC-S5-011-02.description: Ask 'What documents do I have?', verify AI lists documents from tree view

TC-S5-011-03.description: User says 'I don't have a passport', verify AI responds 'I see Reisepass.png in Personal Data'

TC-S5-011-04.description: Upload new document, verify tree view refreshes automatically

TC-S5-011-05.description: Delete document, verify tree view updates to reflect deletion

TC-S5-011-06.description: Ask 'Where is my birth certificate?', verify AI responds with correct folder location

TC-S5-011-07.description: Multiple folders with same document names, verify AI distinguishes by folder

TC-S5-011-08.description: Tree view shows folder hierarchy with correct indentation (├── and └──)

TC-S5-011-09.description: GET /api/context/tree/{caseId}, verify returns tree structure string

TC-S5-011-10.description: AI prompt includes document tree view, verify visible in system context

TC-S5-011-11.description: Multi-level folder structure, verify tree view displays hierarchy correctly

TC-S5-011-12.description: Empty folder in tree view, verify displays as 'Folder/ (empty)'

TC-S5-011-13.description: Ask 'How many documents are in Personal Data?', verify AI counts correctly from tree

TC-S5-011-14.description: Switch to different case, verify tree view switches to new case's documents
